ab: na vaik amen tatiav kati kama a paljilji tjai kama i Kapi.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪kapi叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: nasekakuda a kula ni kama i kapi.
namaperunganga a qinaljivan aya timadju a pasemalav tjanuamen.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: na matjani timadju a kemasi qaljiv ta seman nanguanguaq tua qaljiv.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: na kemacu ti kama ta vutjulj na kung katua saviki tu sipavay tja kama i Kapi.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給Kapi叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: liav a siniqivu ni kama i Kapi a milimilingan ta maljavaljavar amen i qarengan.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: nameqaca sa namesauqaljayanga sun aya ti kama i Kapi a semanzua tjanuaken ta uri vaik anga ken.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: pangtjezuanga kivala a sema tjanuamen nu navenalanga su kula ku ayain ti kama i Kapi.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
